title: A New Forest Factory
article_text: A friendly resident wants to build a secure factory near the west forest. The factory will produce a new device for local people. The device can amaze users with its smart features. Every birth in the town gets a label with the device's name. The factory's root idea comes from a typical need for better communication. We must investigate the expense of this project before we start. The company will concentrate on making plenty of devices each month. A channel on television gave a good recommendation for the product. The factory will rank high in the west region for its leadership. We should explore the forest to find a relevant place for the provision of materials.
